name: orphan_shm_sidecar
description: The workspace includes a stray SHM sidecar without the matching WAL sidecar, matching an interrupted or externally pruned SQLite sidecar pair.
source_hint: Complements the WAL-without-SHM fixture with the opposite external sidecar-pruning shape from beads_rust-rsei.3.3.
notes: The database and JSONL content are otherwise healthy so the fixture isolates the orphaned SHM sidecar.
Current posture is degraded but repairable: doctor reports the sidecar mismatch and doctor --repair quarantines the stray sidecar.
